page_content.section_title: Form IV Analytical Reference Number of WFI Sample
Note: 1. A. R. No. shall be considered from sampling and recording of online result of TOC and Conductivity of WFI return loop sampling point to till 24 hrs up to next sampling and recording of online result of TOC and Conductivity of WFI return loop sampling.
2. In case of any sanitization of water system, sampling shall be carried out after sanitization
3. In case of calibration of online TOC analyzer, Offline TOC sample to be analyzed if batch activity is planned.
